description: Admin page for Phase C validator: run history + findings table with P0/P1/P2 severity filtering. Follows weight-performance page visual pattern exactly.

Atlas Strategy Lab frontend: Morning Brief, Strategy Configurator, Tax Harvesting Alert, Replication Guide, Engine Room, Strategy Explorer, genome radar/walk-forward/equity curve charts. White background, teal accent #1D9E75, professional wealth management aesthetic.

Stock detail page consumes atlas_stock_state_daily (new state engine) + atlas_component_validation (per-tier IC status). Drops 4 decorative/validated_inverse gates (history_gate_pass, liquidity_gate_pass, weinstein_gate_pass, stage1_base_qualifies) on this page only. Adds MasterStateCard (sticky), ComponentValidationRow, OBVContinuousChart, ATRContractionGauge, WithinStatePeers, DwellTimeline (252-day), ComponentScorecard. Re-usable ValidatedBadge renders by atlas_component_validation.status (validated/validated_inverse/weak/decorative). Decisions: drop gates on stock detail page only (cascade later), sticky master card, 252-day timeline. Visual system unchanged (DESIGN.md Javeri Securities v1.0).
